title: Part Feeding Wizard Lighting
description:
Part Feeding Wizard Lighting

Lighting

This screen is used for configure lighting settings.

Item	Description

Not used for this part	Select this to not use the feeder backlight during vision image capturing.

This item is optional.

Built-in Backlight	Select this to use the feeder backlight during vision image capturing.  This option cannot be selected if the backlight is not installed.

Select this to use the feeder backlight during vision image capturing.  This option cannot be selected if the backlight is not installed.

Not used	Do not use a front light.

Custom front light	Call the PF_Control callback function to control user-set custom lighting.

This item is optional.

For more information on the PF_Control callback function, refer to 4. Part Feeding Callback Function - PF_Control.

Call the PF_Control callback function to control user-set custom lighting.

This item is optional.

For more information on the PF_Control callback function, refer to 4. Part Feeding Callback Function - PF_Control.
